reason: Twilio has an official MCP server implementation. There are two options: (1) A hosted server at https://mcp.twilio.com/docs for documentation/schema retrieval, and (2) An alpha MCP server package @twilio-alpha/mcp available via npm that allows executing API calls. The alpha server indexes 30+ Twilio products and enables AI coding agents to access Twilio's API surface directly within IDEs.
